calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came regularly on calendar this day by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218 Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647.
J. Michael Phelps, Esq. for Plaintiff Joseph Torrano.
Shelley Compton; Nicholas D'heedene, Defendants in pro per.
Plaintiff Joseph Torrano was sworn and examined.
Parties settled, terms of the settlement read into the record.
On or before June 15, 2005 at 5:00 PM, tenants Shelley Compton and Nicholas D'heedene shall deliver full and complete possession of 292-29th Street, San Francisco, CA to the Torrano Family Trust by delivery of all keys in tenants' possession to the Trustee's Attorney J. Michael Phelp at l Maritime Plaza, #1600 San Francisco, (415)433-3733.
Tenants shall be entitled to one extension of time until July 1, 2005 at 5:00 PM on condition that they deliver a cashier's check payable to Torrano Family Trust for $647.68 rent due for period June 16, 2005 thru July 1, 2005 @ $40.48 per day by June 16, 2005 at 5:00 PM.
If tenants comply fully with delivery of full possession, then landlord shall waive all accrued and unpaid rent by both tenants through June 15, 2005. However, if tenants fail to deliver possession by June 15, 2005 or by July 1, 2005, but if tenants have timely complied with the requirements for an extention of time, then the landlord shall be entitled to recovery of all rent and rental damages from December 1, 2004 through date of possession (at the rate of $1,214.66 a month and $40.48 a day, plus reasonable attorney fees plus costs.
If tentants fully comply with their obligations to deliver possession, then the plaintiff will file a request for dismissal of the entire action of both defendants. Failure to do so, plaintiff shall be entitled to judgment for all rent and rental damage from December 1, 2004 thru date of possession, plus reasonable attorney fees and costs.
Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN PHELPS FOR PLAINITFF JOSEPH TORRANO
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY CAREY KLETTER FOR DEFENDANT SHELLEY COMPTON

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS
